sub_modules.harris_sobel3x3: Combinational 3x3 Sobel gradient calculator for Ix and Iy.
sub_modules.harris_gradient_products: Combinational gradient product stage producing Ix squared, Iy squared, and Ix times Iy.
sub_modules.harris_gaussian3x3: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian smoothing filter using 1-2-1 separable weights normalized by 16.
sub_modules.harris_response: Combinational Harris response arithmetic computing det minus k times trace squared in fixed point.
sub_modules.harris_threshold: Combinational threshold decision stage producing the binary corner flag.
